headline: News Corp (NWS) Q3 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Robert Thomson: Thank you, Mike.  News Corp has again delivered resounding results this quarter, indeed marking the 12th straight quarter of profitability growth on a continuing operations basis.  For the third quarter of fiscal 2026, our total revenue rose 9% to $2.2 billion, while total segment EBITDA increased a handsome 18% to $343 million, and the overall margin expanded from 14.4% to 15.7%.

headline: NWSA's Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: News Corporation posts fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue growth, fueled by gains in Dow Jones, digital real estate and book publishing.
